-fno-exceptions -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "/Users/nathanngaleu/Documents/Projects/RTOS-PriorityInversion-WD/STM32F446xx_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -u _printf_float -Wl,-Map=RTOS-PriorityInversion-WD.map -Wl,--gc-sections
